The '''Search-Scan 4''' was a multicapable [[Security scanner/Legends|security scanner]] manufactured by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]. It was used for various detection needs by the Empire and local governments. The size of the scanner was that of a large chest and it was very efficient, being able to penetrate even shields. The scanner is often transported on a cart or [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsor sled]], and contains numerous probes and receptors attached to the unit by insulated cabling.
